ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metropolitan_areas" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "size_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the metropolitan area by size */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* State where the metropolitan area is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the metropolitan area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the metropolitan area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the metropolitan area */,
  "area_square_km" REAL /* Total area of the metropolitan area in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metropolitan area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the population count is recorded */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for the metropolitan area on the given date */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the gender distribution of the population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the ethnicity distribution of the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES metropolitan_areas ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, urban planner, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metropolitan area the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., population growth, demographic trends) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES metropolitan_areas ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metropolitan area the data is about */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the exported data file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES metropolitan_areas ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report share */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being shared */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the report is shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report share (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
